subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned unto God, who hath been stirred by the recognition of reunion in His days, and hath set his face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی ان اذکر من اقبل الی الله و تحرک من عرف الوصال فی ایامه و توجه
subcodes.subjects: @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
